//: tsx runs the B.03 seed/verify scripts with this config. It extends the root tsconfig and adds path aliases: `@/*` (so scripts can import app modules) and `server-only`/`client-only` mapped to a no-op stub (those modules import 'server-only', whose real package throws outside the Next.js bundler — in a Node script we are already on the server). This config is used ONLY by the scripts; the real Next.js build keeps the genuine guard.
